themes.label: Worship
themes.summary: This chapter gives prominence to praise, worship, thanksgiving, or blessing God’s name. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "How shall we sing the LORD'S song in a strange land? (אֵיךְ נָשִׁיר אֶת־שִׁיר־יְהוָה עַל אַדְ...". Word-study detail reinforces "שִׁ֥ירוּ: saying Sing - to sing".
